summary: The pnpm audit job found a moderate severity vulnerability in the `ip-address` package (XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods, versions <=10.1.0) in the dependency chain `network__fetch>@pnpm/network.agent>@pnpm/network.proxy-agent>socks-proxy-agent>socks>ip-address`. The audit command exited with code 1, failing the CI job.
root_cause: pnpm audit detected 1 moderate vulnerability: `ip-address` <=10.1.0 has XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods (GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g). The audit process exited with code 1, causing the CI job to fail.

evidence.quote: │ moderate            │ ip-address has XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods   │
evidence.reason: Identifies the specific vulnerability detected by pnpm audit.
Shows the affected version range of the ip-address package.
Shows the dependency path through which the vulnerable package is included.
Confirms the audit found a vulnerability.
Confirms the audit command failed with a non-zero exit code, causing the CI job to fail.

suggested_fix: Upgrade the `ip-address` package to >=10.1.1 (the patched version) by updating the dependency chain: update `socks` or `socks-proxy-agent` to a version that depends on `ip-address` >=10.1.1, or add an override/resolution in the root `package.json` to force `ip-address` to >=10.1.1.
